untranslatable_reason: Bullish Belt Hold is a specific candlestick pattern requiring visual/morphological analysis of candle structure (body position at low, specific wick characteristics) that cannot be fully expressed using only the allowed indicators. The pattern requires: (1) identification of downtrend context, (2) detection of a candle opening near the low and closing near/at the high (belt hold morphology), and (3) optional retracement context within prior uptrend. These morphological requirements exceed the capability of price/volume/oscillator indicators alone.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using close regime check for downtrend and body size as proxy for bullish candle, but true belt hold pattern recognition requires candle position analysis (open=low, close=high) not available in indicator set. Recommend: (1) adding candle_position indicator, (2) implementing custom pattern detection function, or (3) using close >= open AND (open - low) / range < 0.1 AND (high - close) / range < 0.1 if custom operators allowed.
